summary: Iteration 58: Now Spinning Record Search feature complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified via Playwright - search input, fuzzy matching, record selection/deselection, empty state with bee emoji, full end-to-end Now Spinning flow.

issues: Album art shows placeholder when cover_url is invalid (e.g., test data URLs) - expected behavior, just cosmetic in tests

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/discogs/search requires auth - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/discogs/search requires min 2 chars (422) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/discogs/search returns label, catno, country, color_variant fields - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/discogs/search format field is string (not list) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/search/unified requires auth - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/search/unified requires min 2 chars - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/search/unified returns grouped results (records, collectors, posts, listings) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/search/unified records have variant fields - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/search/discogs requires auth - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/search/discogs returns Discogs catalog results - PASSED
Frontend: Now Spinning modal has [data-testid='spin-record-search'] search input - PASSED
Frontend: Search input placeholder is 'search your collection...' - PASSED
Frontend: Typing 'tay' shows Taylor Swift record from collection (fuzzy match) - PASSED
Frontend: Selecting record shows compact card with album art, title, artist - PASSED
Frontend: Selected card has X button [data-testid='spin-deselect-record'] - PASSED
Frontend: Clicking X deselects record and shows search input again - PASSED
Frontend: Searching for non-existent record shows 'no results in your collection' with bee emoji - PASSED
Frontend: Empty state shows 'add it first →' link [data-testid='spin-add-record-link'] to /add-record - PASSED
Frontend: Full Now Spinning flow works end-to-end - PASSED
Frontend: New Haul search shows RecordSearchResult with variant details (year·label·catno, format·country) - PASSED
Frontend: ISO search shows RecordSearchResult with color variant pills (e.g., '180g', 'Anniversary Edition') - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: ComposerBar.js Lines 105-130: searchCollection() properly implements local array filter with word-based scoring for fuzzy match
ComposerBar.js Line 108: 300ms debounce via setTimeout - correctly prevents excessive re-renders
ComposerBar.js Lines 132-142: selectSpinRecord() and deselectSpinRecord() properly manage state transitions
ComposerBar.js Lines 322-354: Search input UI with correct placeholder, autoFocus, and data-testid attributes
ComposerBar.js Lines 342-353: Empty state correctly shows bee emoji and 'add it first →' link with href='/add-record'
RecordSearchResult.js Lines 11-14: Correctly builds detail lines from year, label, catno, format, country
RecordSearchResult.js Lines 42-44: Color variant pill badge with amber styling (bg-amber-100, text-amber-700)
database.py search_discogs() Lines 165-198: Correctly extracts label, catno, country, color_variant from Discogs API response
search.py unified_search Lines 84-96: Records output includes all variant fields for frontend display

test_credentials.note: Test user has 3 records in collection: Taylor Swift - Lover, Radiohead - OK Computer, Joni Mitchell - Blue

seed_data_creation: Created test user testspinui with 3 records (Taylor Swift, Radiohead, Joni Mitchell) having variant fields populated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58: Now Spinning modal search feature fully tested. 1) Search input replaces dropdown - uses local collection filter not API. 2) 300ms debounce prevents lag. 3) Fuzzy matching via word-based scoring. 4) Selection shows compact card with X to deselect. 5) Empty state shows 'no results in your collection' with bee emoji and 'add it first →' link. 6) RecordSearchResult component shows variant details (year·label·catno, format·country, color pill). 7) Full end-to-end Now Spinning flow verified. Key files: ComposerBar.js (Lines 105-375), RecordSearchResult.js, database.py search_discogs().

screenshots_taken.spin_10_empty_state.png: Empty state showing 'no results in your collection' with bee emoji and 'add it first →' link
screenshots_taken.spin_11_ready_to_post.png: Full form filled: Radiohead - OK Computer, Late Night mood, caption added
screenshots_taken.spin_13_haul_search.png: New Haul modal with Discogs search results showing variant details (year·label·catno, 180g pill)
screenshots_taken.spin_14_iso_search.png: ISO modal with Beatles Abbey Road results showing color variant pills
